programme.title: Dr Dolittle (1998)
programme.desc: A doctor is stunned to discover he can talk to animals, and it is not long before his home and surgery are taken over by an assortment of ailing creatures in need of help. However, when the medic's odd behaviour attracts his colleagues' attention, he is forced to rely on his new-found furry friends to save him from the asylum. Comedy, starring Eddie Murphy, Ossie Davis and Oliver Platt(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard kick Sheldon off their physics quiz team and replace him with Leslie Winkle, so he decides to prove his superiority by forming a rival quartet of his own. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny makes fun of Leonard's habit of collecting sci-fi memorabilia, so he decides to give it up - but his friends object and do everything possible to persuade him not to change his ways. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica, Barry and Adam are not happy when their distant relative Gleb visits from Russia - until they realise he can make their lives easier. Beverly starts working on her cookbook, which causes tension with the Frentas(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Adam team up to do a cooking show together on television. Meanwhile, Barry ruins the one college letter of recommendation that he is able to obtain(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The precinct gets a new detective who is coming away from a 12-year undercover assignment with the Mob. Boyle's latest mess lands everyone in trouble with the caretakers, and Gina directs a video about the precinct for Captain Holt. Jason Mantzoukas and Kate Flannery guest star(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt allows Santiago and Peralta to house-sit for him while he visits Kevin in Paris, but mayhem ensues when Holt's beloved dog, Cheddar, goes missing on their watch. A romantic fling between Adrian Pimento and Diaz disrupts life at the precinct, disgusting their co-workers(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to confront his fear of driving when both Penny and Howard refuse to give him a lift to work. Desperate to be free of the obligation, Leonard and the gang intervene to discover why their friend never learnt to drive. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki, with Octavia Spencer (The Help)(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard kick Sheldon off their physics quiz team and replace him with Leslie Winkle, so he decides to prove his superiority by forming a rival quartet of his own. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon stumbles upon a major scientific breakthrough, causing him to feel like a fraud, while Penny steps up her game with Leonard after seeing Howard make a romantic gesture to Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends try to solve the mystery of Sheldon's post-lunch activities, following him to a secret room where they discover how he chills out. Elsewhere, Leonard is jealous when Penny starts texting a classmate, but things quickly change when Alex gets flirty with him(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends fight over a ring they believe was used in the Lord of the Rings film trilogy. Leonard hopes to return the item to its rightful owner - but Raj wishes to sell it so he can buy a jet ski, and Sheldon develops a Gollum-like obsession with the precious object(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is awarded a prestigious prize by the university, but is scared of collecting the gong at a ceremony because he knows he'll have to give a speech. Penny tries to gee him up with rousing references to X-Men, and Leonard and Raj offer psychological guidance - without much success(n)

programme.title: We're Going on a Bear Hunt
programme.desc: Animated adventure, based on the popular children's bedtime book by Michael Rosen and Helen Oxenbury. Stan, Katie, Rosie, Max and the baby, along with Rufus the dog, all embark on a quest to find some bears. Trekking through whirling snowstorms, muddy bogs and dark forests, the siblings refuse to let anything get in their way. However, when Rosie and Rufus end up getting lost, bear-hunting suddenly doesn't seem quite so much fun after all. Featuring the voices of Olivia Colman, Pam Ferris and Mark Williams as Mum, Grandma and Dad respectively(n)

programme.title: The Art of The Snowman and the Snowdog
programme.desc: The making of festive film The Snowman and the Snowdog, a sequel to the Raymond Briggs-inspired animation The Snowman. The programme shows how the character Billy is brought to life using only a pencil and a light box, transforming a simple sketch into a believable screen presence(n)

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Former contestants Jane Beedle and Andrew Smyth from 2016, and Liam Charles and Flo Atkins from 2017 join Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding for festive-themed challenges. It's down to judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith to decide who wins the Christmas Star Baker title. Plus, British rockers The Darkness perform their hit, Christmas Time (Don't Let the Bells End)(n)

programme.title: Ice Age: The Meltdown (2006)
programme.desc: Sid the sloth, Manny the mammoth and Diego the sabre-toothed tiger grimly realise the good life is about to come to an abrupt end as flood waters threaten their homes. However, a vulture suggests they could turn an old giant tree into a boat and make their escape, so the three friends set off in search of it. Animated adventure sequel, with the voices of Ray Romano, John Leguizamo and Denis Leary(n)

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn - Part 2 (2012)
programme.desc: Vampire couple Edward and Bella enjoy a happy married life with their new daughter, but the leaders of the undead race believe the child is a threat to their entire species. The protective parents gather their allies to defend the girl in a final battle with their enemies. Conclusion of the romantic fantasy series, with Kristen Stewart, Robert Pattinson, Taylor Lautner and Michael Sheen(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Some very famous faces join the series' opinionated viewers in a special episode for this year's Stand Up to Cancer appeal. Jack Whitehall and his parents Michael and Hilary, Steve Pemberton and Reece Shearsmith, Yungblud and Jack Saunders, and Grayson, Philippa and Flo Perry take to their sofas. Plus, returning from the recent Celebrity series, are Nick and Liv Grimshaw, Denise Van Outen and Eddie Boxshall, and Martin and Roman Kemp(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week. Programmes under scrutiny include Celebrity First Dates Hotel for SU2C, Britain's Got Talent: The Champions, The Circle Vote Night, Strictly Come Dancing and This Morning, plus the movie A Quiet Place(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson meets 24-year-old fitness fanatic Rose, whose body has been getting all the attention in the gym while her love life has been neglected. She is bored of being one of the lads and hopes to be seen for all that she is. Next up is Clarissa, a 22-year-old barista from Basingstoke who is looking for her dream woman. Will either of tonight's singletons pick the right date when everything is stripped back to basics?(n)

programme.title: First Dates Abroad
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed joker goes on a date with a real-estate agent, and they decide to settle whether to see each other again on the outcome of a toin coss(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tests a newly invented device after hearing that it can help him to read people's emotions. Leonard isn't happy when he finds out that Penny's brother is coming to town so that she can help him to find a job. Raj gathers his ex-girlfriends together so that they can give him some dating advice(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Howard attempt to distract Sheldon with a trip to a historic railway when he slows the progress of their work on the Air Force guidance system. Raj and Stuart look after baby Halley, while Penny and Amy take Bernadette out(n)

programme.title: School of Rock
programme.desc: Tomika is inspired by the play 'Hamilton' to create her own hip-hop musical about the Alamo. Freddy is determined to use the play to get closer to Summer(n)

programme.title: School of Rock
programme.desc: Summer takes pity on the band's nemesis after he falls on hard times, and agrees to help his music career despite her friends' caution. Guest starring Kendall Schmidt(n)

programme.title: Ice Age: A Mammoth Christmas
programme.desc: Festive spin-off of the animated films. Sid the sloth accidentally ruins one of Manny the mammoth's Christmas traditions, and worries he may be on Santa Claus's naughty list - so he heads to the North Pole in a bid to redeem himself. Featuring the voices of John Leguizamo, Ray Romano, Queen Latifah and Denis Leary(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Australian drag superstar Courtney Act hosts the first night, preparing a vegan menu for Debbie McGee, Charlotte Dawson, Dick and Dom, and Stevo the Madman(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Charlotte Dawson hosts the second night of the dinner-party challenge despite never having cooked in her life, and serves up mushy pea soup followed by fish and chips(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Internet prankster Stevo The Madman plans a Caribbean-themed Christmas dinner party, hoping to impress his rivals with authentic Caribbean cuisine and entertainment(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Debbie McGee plans a black-tie event complete with a butler and silver service. She also shows off her dancing talents - although a few revelations from her past steal the show(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Children's TV presenters Dick and Dom host a 'summer Christmas festival' - in a bungalow. Mini mac and cheese, Chrimbo Crumble and a Christmas Dinner Kebab are all on the menu. Charlotte Dawson is bamboozled by one of Dom's magic tricks, Stevo the Madman shows he's learned some manners over the week, Courtney Act eats food from the bin, and Debbie McGee gets down in the garden(n)

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: In the second of two yuletide specials, Noel Fielding, Sandi Toksvig, Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood welcome back four past contestants to compete once more, with Benjamina Ebuehi, Rob Billington, Rav Bansal and Sandy Docherty taking on a series of Winter Wonderland-themed challenges in a bid to win the Star Baker title(n)

programme.title: Dr Dolittle 2 (2001)
programme.desc: The vet with a talent for talking to animals comes to the aid of forest creatures that need his help protecting their homes from land developers. He also has to deal with the love life of a circus bear that has fallen for a wild female. Comedy sequel, starring Eddie Murphy and Kevin Pollak, with the voices of Steve Zahn, Lisa Kudrow and Isaac Hayes(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's obsession with gift-giving etiquette annoys his friends as Christmas approaches. Meanwhile, Leonard is thrilled to meet an award-winning scientist, only to be filled with jealousy when his new colleague takes an interest in Penny. With guest star Michael Trucco (Battlestar Galactica, One Tree Hill)(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard's mother visits and he is horrified to learn that Sheldon knows more than he does about his own family, including his parents' impending divorce and the death of his dog. Guest starring Christine Baranski(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is thrilled when he is asked to design his own video game for a school project. Elsewhere, Beverly worries that Pops may have a gambling problem(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Dropouts are over the moon when they are booked to perform a gig at a charity carnival, and Adam takes the opportunity to make his very first rockumentary. Meanwhile, Beverly's concerns about Murray's health push him to the limit(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Terry tackles an old case with Jake's help to prove his mettle to his old precinct, while Adrian becomes Charles' new roommate and Amy goes on a difficult training exercise with Holt and Rosa(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Diaz enlists Peralta to help change Jeffords' disapproving opinion about her fast-moving relationship with Pimento. However, the new couple's love for each other has to be put on hold when Pimento comes to believe that someone from his past is trying to kill him(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny hosts a Halloween costume party, which proves a worthy test for the boys' social skills. During the event, Leonard has a run-in with Penny's ex-boyfriend. Kaley Cuoco, Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg star(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang become concerned when Sheldon's former admirer, Dr Ramona Nowitzki, resurfaces while Amy is away working at Princeton University. Jim Parsons stars(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Howard and his fellow astronauts sit in the space shuttle awaiting launch, he reflects on the tumultuous events of the previous few days, when he and Bernadette tried to get married. Meanwhile, his friends witness the blast-off on TV at home(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette receives her PhD, and the friends then tease Howard about being the only one among them who is not a doctor. Meanwhile, Raj becomes Sheldon's new flatmate after overhearing Leonard and Priya engaging in a Star Trek bedroom fantasy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kunal Nayyar(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard is put in charge of looking after Stephen Hawking's wheelchair when the famous scientist comes to lecture at the university for a week - and takes advantage of his position to blackmail Sheldon into performing assorted unpleasant tasks. Guest starring Stephen Hawking(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard has doubts about his feelings for Priya when he kisses a girl he meets in the comic-book store, while the rest of the friends play pranks on Sheldon in celebration of Halloween. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons(n)

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon (2010)
programme.desc: A clumsy Viking boy longs to become a mighty dragon slayer and protect his village from the fearsome flying lizards, but his father thinks he is not up to the task. However, when he sets out to prove his worth, he ends up befriending a dragon, and realises his people may have misjudged the creatures. Animated fantasy, with the voices of Jay Baruchel and Gerard Butler(n)

programme.title: Home Alone 3 (1997)
programme.desc: Cheeky eight-year-old Alex Pruitt is delighted to be given a remote-controlled toy car by his neighbour - unaware it contains a stolen microchip. A gang of crooks heads to Alex's town with the intention of recovering the valuable item, but the resourceful youngster has prepared for their arrival with a series of nasty booby-traps. Comedy sequel, starring Alex D Linz, Olek Krupa, Rya Kihlstedt and Lenny von Dohlen(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon passes his driving test, so the lads decide to take a trip to a theme park. However, things start to go wrong when their route is obstructed by a funeral cortege and the newly qualified motorist has an accident in the car park. Later, Will regrets ever making the journey when he disgraces himself on a rollercoaster(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will discovers that attending a mixed-sex school is not so bad after all when he manages to get a date with the most popular girl in the year above. However, his growing obsession with her begins to alienate him from his friends. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The lads visit a Caravan Club meeting under the impression that it is really a massive orgy, but are embarrassed when Jay's dad decides to give them advice on sex - whether they like it or not. Sitcom about four teenagers growing up in suburbia, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is put in charge of organising the end-of-term Christmas prom, and tempts fate by enlisting the help of Simon, Jay and Neil. Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison star(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is furious when she learns that Sheldon has shared intimate details of their relationship with his colleagues at the university, prompting their first fight since moving in together. Raj considers trying to live without financial support from his father, who thinks he is spoilt(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Cut off from his father's fortune, Raj struggles to balance his books, so decides to appoint Sheldon to organise his finances and get him out of debt. Penny considers joining the guys at Comic-Con because she thinks Leonard wants her to come along(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on programmes including The X Factor: Celebrity, The Lesbian Guide to Straight Sex, Own the Sky: Jetpack Dreamers, Celebrity Hunted, Pain, Pus and Poison: The Search for Modern Medicines and the news(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts a fresh run of the dating show. This time, 30-year-old Stephanie, a self-confessed 'dating disaster', and 28-year-old Bethany, a free-spirited artist from Essex, choose a date from a selection of six naked people(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon passes his driving test, so the lads decide to take a trip to a theme park. However, things start to go wrong when their route is obstructed by a funeral cortege and the newly qualified motorist has an accident in the car park. Later, Will regrets ever making the journey when he disgraces himself on a rollercoaster(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will discovers that attending a mixed-sex school is not so bad after all when he manages to get a date with the most popular girl in the year above. However, his growing obsession with her begins to alienate him from his friends. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly worries that the family's holiday traditions have grown stale, so she launches a new celebration called 'Super Hanukkah'. Feeling ignored by his older brother, Adam goes to great lengths to make Barry spend more time with him(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly talks Erica into writing a Hanukkah song for the school holiday concert, inspiring Barry to prove his own musical prowess. Adam discovers that the things he loved as a child aren't always as good as he remembers. Ana Gasteyer (Suburgatory) guest stars(n)

programme.title: School of Rock
programme.desc: The band's instruments get stolen, so they hold a sale to raise money to replace them(n)

programme.title: School of Rock
programme.desc: When School of Rock attempts to become the leading quinceanera band in Austin, everything seems to go wrong, thanks to a scary movie(n)

programme.title: Olive, the Other Reindeer
programme.desc: A dog sets off for the North Pole to save Christmas after hearing that Blitzen the reindeer has been injured. Convinced her services are needed for the big night, the intrepid pooch and her flea sidekick embark on all manner of adventures, befriending a penguin and meeting an evil postman hell-bent on abolishing the festive season. Animated tale, featuring the voices of Drew Barrymore, former REM frontman Michael Stipe and Simpsons creator Matt Groening(n)

programme.title: The Snowman
programme.desc: Raymond Briggs' festive favourite, a wordless animated fantasy telling the story of a small boy whose snowman magically comes to life and whisks him off on the journey of a lifetime to the North Pole. Howard Blake's score includes the award-winning song Walking in the Air, which was taken to number five in the charts by a young Aled Jones, but is here sung by Peter Auty(n)

programme.title: The Snowman and the Snowdog
programme.desc: Animated sequel to Raymond Briggs' classic festive tale The Snowman, telling the story of another youngster's magical Christmas. A boy's snowman and snowdog come to life at the stroke of midnight and take him on an adventure to the North Pole, where he and his new companions meet an assortment of colourful characters, including Santa himself, before returning home - where a wonderful surprise awaits(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Daphne reveals the truth about Marshall becoming a judge in a text message to Lily, so he begs Ted to try to delete the notification while Lily is sleeping using the gang's 'no questions asked' rule. However, Barney and Robin also attempt to help Ted, but realise they are both acting on their own initiative without consulting each other. American sitcom, starring Josh Radnor and Alyson Hannigan(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Strains are put on Barney's relationships as the conflict between Robin and his mother Loretta escalates. Meanwhile, Ted and Cassie try to enjoy a trip to a lighthouse, and Marshall and Daphne must deal with a stowaway on their road trip. American sitcom, starring Josh Radnor and Alyson Hannigan(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tries to get Sheldon into the Christmas mood by playing a game, but things do not go as planned when Sheldon reveals a childhood trauma. Raj goes out with the girls and reveals he had crushes on both Penny and Bernadette - but not Amy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon leaves for Texas when his sister goes into labour. While he is away, the rest of the friends decorate for Christmas and reflect on how much he has changed their lives. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days (2012)
programme.desc: Weedy youngster Greg finds his plans for a lazy school holiday ruined when his mother bans video games and his father organises a series of family activities. When he finds out a girl he likes is working at a country club, he tells his family he has a summer job there as an excuse to spend time with her - but struggles to keep up the deception. Family comedy sequel, starring Zachary Gordon and Steve Zahn(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Following the break-up of Penny's relationship, Leonard finally summons up the courage to ask her out. When she accepts, they both turn to Sheldon for advice on how to handle the forthcoming date. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon finds himself forced to keep a secret when Penny decides to tell him what happened on her disappointing first date with Leonard. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Having become obsessed with game shows since leaving college, Erica decides to apply to appear on television series Jeopardy!. A new crush makes Barry realise that he might not be quite over Lainey yet(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry fights Erica for his right to attend the college of his choice, and Adam decides to see the movie Willow instead of spending Mother's Day with Beverly(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Amy has to go undercover at a women's prison and befriend one of the inmates in order to try to get information about a criminal operation. Back at the precinct, Holt and the team plan a fake funeral in an attempt to catch a hitman(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: After identifying the mob informant, Holt, Jake and Rosa make plans to infiltrate FBI headquarters to get the man's files, with the captain bringing in his former partner to help out. Guest starring Dennis Haysbert (24's President Palmer)(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj and Howard register Sheldon with an online dating site hoping to find his perfect female equivalent. Meanwhile, a drunk Penny seduces Leonard, but regrets it the next day. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco. Mayim Bialik (Blossom) makes her first appearance on the show(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends compete in a scavenger hunt designed by Raj to test their scientific knowledge and life skills, but the game brings out the best and worst in everyone. As the hunt progresses, Howard and Amy begin to bond over their shared musical tastes, while Penny and Sheldon work together as a team and Bernadette becomes fiercely competitive(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is stunned when Sheldon announces he is about to go on his first-ever date, and is even more surprised to find herself tagging along. Meanwhile, Leonard and Raj take a trip to the hospital after Howard's new robotic arm creates problems(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny becomes addicted to an online game based on the world of Conan the Barbarian. As her obsession intensifies, she begins to neglect her friends and seeks the company of the usually snide Sheldon, whom she continually pesters for advice. Starring Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny's TV breaks down, so she heads to the boys' flat to watch her favourite shows. However, Sheldon tires of her presence and bans future visits, leading to an embarrassing form of retaliation. Meanwhile, Howard and Raj search for the America's Next Top Model house(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is dismayed when the group spends the Thanksgiving holiday at Mrs Wolowitz's house, but hits it off with Bernadette's father. Meanwhile, Penny realises she must deal with a mistake from her past when she and Leonard have an argument. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Art of The Snowman and the Snowdog
programme.desc: The making of festive film The Snowman and the Snowdog, a sequel to the Raymond Briggs-inspired animation The Snowman. The programme shows how the character Billy is brought to life using only a pencil and a light box, transforming a simple sketch into a believable screen presence(n)

programme.title: The Art of The Snowman and the Snowdog
programme.desc: A look at the making of Channel 4's Christmas film The Snowman and the Snowdog. The programme explores how an animator brings the latter character to life using only a few pencils and a light box(n)

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie (2007)
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly pollutes Lake Springfield, so the US government decides to isolate the city underneath a giant dome. The Simpsons manage to escape and plan to start a new life in Alaska - but learn Springfield is about to be destroyed, and return to save their friends. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta, Julie Kavner, Nancy Cartwright and Yeardley Smith(n)

programme.title: Paddington (2014)
programme.desc: An earthquake forces a bear from the Peruvian jungle to start a new life in London. He finds modern Britain to be very different from the stories told to him by his aunt, but makes a new home with a kindly family. However, a sinister taxidermist intends to turn him into a museum exhibit. Comedy based on Michael Bond's series of children's books, starring Hugh Bonneville, Sally Hawkins and Nicole Kidman, with the voice of Ben Whishaw(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The gang goes on the infamous sociology and geography field trip to Swanage, during which Neil tries his hardest to avoid the advances of over-friendly teacher Mr Kennedy. Meanwhile, Will takes a shine to new girl Lauren - but she is only interested in Simon. Comedy, starring Simon Bird(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is unhappy about being forced by Mr Gilbert to take a work experience job at a garage due to a mix-up that sees Neil joining a newspaper. Meanwhile, Jay sorts out a placement for himself and Simon at his father's plant hire company. Starring Simon Bird and Blake Harrison(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Ian Snowley and Kay Marriot fell in love with the volcanic landscapes and coasts of Lanzarote, and are now determined to buy a house that they can use to explore the island further. Scarlette Douglas shows the couple five properties, hoping to maximise their budget of £150,000(n)

programme.title: The Jewel of the Nile (1985)
programme.desc: A novelist travels to the Middle East to become a sheik's official biographer, only to end up being held hostage by him. Her lover joins forces with an old enemy to rescue her, but they get drawn into the hunt for a mysterious ancient treasure that has a connection to an eccentric holy man. Comedy adventure sequel to Romancing the Stone, starring Michael Douglas, Kathleen Turner and Danny DeVito(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick treats Labrador Fieval, who needs a hip replacement on both sides, and the programme catches up with some of the pets and owners who benefited from the surgery's pioneering techniques and inventions over the past year, including Labrador cross Scooby, who lost a leg in his fight against cancer, Jasper the puppy, whose legs were so deformed he needed two operations, and Pixie the cat, who gained a bionic limb to help her survive(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Actress Chelsee Healey hosts the first festive dinner party, focusing on a Caribbean Christmas theme, but the pressures of cooking become too much and the one-tiime Waterloo Road star abandons her guests during dessert. However, singer Marcus Collins eventually persuades her to return to the table and enjoy the rest of the night with fellow actress Crissy Rock, actor Nick Pickard and model Jasmine Lennard(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hollyoaks star Nick Pickard (Tony Hutchinson) hosts a festive-themed dinner party, hoping to claim the £1,000 charity prize and win over initially unimpressed model Jasmine Lennard. He tries to get everyone into a festive mood with a Santa's grotto, elf dress code and gourmet cuisine, but the stress of the occasion takes its toll(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Actress Crissy Rock hosts the third party from Liverpool, and treats her dining companions to a retro-themed evening. Plus, the surprise arrival of a new guest turns the week on its head. Chrissy hopes her festive celebration will help secure the £1,000 Christmas prize for a charity of her choice(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The next celebrity host is singer and proud Liverpudlian Marcus Collins, who hopes to win the £1,000 Christmas prize for a charity of his choice by preparing a large main course with a unique Scouse flavour, and putting on boy band-style entertainment(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Margi Clarke hosts the final dinner party in Liverpool, and treats her guests to a pantomime-themed evening with a visit from a psychic, some practical jokes and a dish entitled Margi's Magic Flying Phoenix. She hopes her festive frenzy will secure her the £1,000 Christmas prize for her chosen charity(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree await the arrival of their guests, who are expecting a luxurious Christmas at the chateau. Dick continues work on installing the lift, but the project tests his ingenuity to the limit, while Angel finds more valuables in the attic, including a collection of vinyl records(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: At the end of a busy year at Chateau de la Motte-Husson, Dick and Angel throw a Christmas party for everyone who helped them in restoring the property to its current glory. The festive menu includes produce from their own walled garden, as well as homemade wines, and the couple also put up a Christmas tree which, as usual, is on a spectacular scale(n)

programme.title: White Christmas (1954)
programme.desc: A pair of former soldiers start a new career as nightclub entertainers. They try to boost the popularity of their old commanding officer's struggling winter resort in Vermont by staging a series of extravagant shows, with a little help from their former army buddies and a talented singing sister act. Musical, starring Bing Crosby, Danny Kaye, Vera-Ellen, Dean Jagger, Sig Rumann, Mary Wickes, Anne Whitfield and Rosemary Clooney, featuring seasonal songs by Irving Berlin(n)

programme.title: Britain's Best Loved Sitcoms
programme.desc: Documentary celebrating some of the many classic sitcoms that have entertained British audiences over the past 50 years, narrated by Tamsin Greig, herself a star of the likes of Friday Night Dinner and Black Books. Along the way, she takes in everything from modern 'game-changers' such as The Office, Twenty Twelve and Peep Show, to vintage shows including The Likely Lads, Dad's Army and Steptoe and Son. Making use of a cross-generational poll, she presents a countdown that reveals which show has become the most revered sitcom of all, and a host of stars including Mrs Brown's Boys' Brendan O'Carroll, One Foot in the Grave's Richard Wilson, Blackadder's Tony Robinson and Keeping Up Appearances' Patricia Routledge share their thoughts on working on some of the nation's most treasured comedy dramas(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: This festive episode from 1996 finds the Craggy Island clerics and six other priests lost in what seems to be the world's largest lingerie department, with only Ted's quick thinking preventing the Catholic Church being rocked by a major scandal. His bravery earns him the coveted Golden Cleric award, which is when his troubles really begin. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Frank Kelly(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal allows himself to be led astray by rebellious new arrival Father Damien, and Ted is suspected of being the criminal mastermind behind a scandalous theft. Comedy, with Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Joe Rooney(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal and Ted get involved in yet another bout of rivalry with their counterparts over on Rugged Island - this time by writing a song that will allow them the dubious honour of representing Ireland in the Eurovision-style music contest Eurosong. Ardal O'Hanlon and Dermot Morgan star(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Bishop Brennan descends on Craggy Island to investigate rumours that Father Jack has developed the unfortunate habit of sleepwalking in the nude - only to come face to face with his worst fear. Clerical comedy, with Ardal O'Hanlon and Dermot Morgan(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Clare Grogan guest stars as a feminist protest singer who visits Craggy Island and talks gormless Dougal into giving her the parochial house while Ted is out judging a local beauty contest. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan(n)

programme.title: Small, Far Away: The World of Father Ted
programme.desc: Documentary first shown in 2011 following Graham Linehan and Arthur Mathews, who created Father Ted, as they embark on a road trip across Ireland in celebration of the 15th anniversary of the comedy's birth. They revisit some of the key locations from the series, and reflect on how producer Geoffrey Perkins suggested turning a one-off spoof documentary into a sitcom. With contributions by Ardal O'Hanlon, Frank Kelly, Graham Norton and more(n)

programme.title: Britain's Best Loved Sitcoms
programme.desc: Documentary celebrating some of the many classic sitcoms that have entertained British audiences over the past 50 years, narrated by Tamsin Greig, herself a star of the likes of Friday Night Dinner and Black Books. Along the way, she takes in everything from modern 'game-changers' such as The Office, Twenty Twelve and Peep Show, to vintage shows including The Likely Lads, Dad's Army and Steptoe and Son. Making use of a cross-generational poll, she presents a countdown that reveals which show has become the most revered sitcom of all, and a host of stars including Mrs Brown's Boys' Brendan O'Carroll, One Foot in the Grave's Richard Wilson, Blackadder's Tony Robinson and Keeping Up Appearances' Patricia Routledge share their thoughts on working on some of the nation's most treasured comedy dramas(n)

programme.title: Father Ted

His bravery earns him the coveted Golden Cleric award, which is when his troubles really begin. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Frank Kelly(n)

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp brings together four of the most creative Christmas cake crafters in Britain for inspiration(n)

programme.title: White Christmas (1954)
programme.desc: A pair of former soldiers start a new career as nightclub entertainers. They try to boost the popularity of their old commanding officer's struggling winter resort in Vermont by staging a series of extravagant shows, with a little help from their former army buddies and a talented singing sister act. Musical, starring Bing Crosby, Danny Kaye, Vera-Ellen, Dean Jagger, Sig Rumann, Mary Wickes, Anne Whitfield and Rosemary Clooney, featuring seasonal songs by Irving Berlin(n)

programme.title: The 100 Greatest Musicals
programme.desc: Part one of two. Denise Van Outen presents a countdown of the nation's favourite 100 musicals of all time, as voted for by the British public. The nominations feature a selection of classic and contemporary films, including Moulin Rouge with Ewan McGregor and Nicole Kidman, the ever-popular The Sound of Music, which starred Julie Andrews and Christopher Plummer, and rapper Marshall 'Eminem' Mathers' cinematic debut 8 Mile. Featuring interviews with Scott Baio (Bugsy Malone), Ron Moody (Oliver!) and Susan Sarandon (The Rocky Horror Picture Show)(n)

programme.title: Romancing the Stone (1984)
programme.desc: A romantic novelist goes in search of her kidnapped sister in the steamy jungles of South America, only to become the target of a villainous general who demands as a ransom the valuable treasure map in her possession. Help is at hand in the form of a craggy daredevil fortune hunter, who has his eye on a share of the profits. Comedy adventure, starring Michael Douglas, Kathleen Turner and Danny DeVito(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: After another busy year, Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree prepare for the festive season at Chateau de la Motte-Husson. There's an exquisite menu, complete with home-made treats, while Angel creates beautiful crafts as the family host a traditional French Christmas for friends and family - and some special guests too(n)

programme.title: The Longest Day (1962)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama chronicling the planning and execution of the Allied landings in Normandy on June 6, 1944, from the differing perspectives of the British, German, French and American forces. Starring Richard Burton, Richard Todd, Kenneth More, Sean Connery, John Wayne, Robert Mitchum, Henry Fonda, Curt Jurgens, Roddy McDowall and Rod Steiger(n)

programme.title: The Beatles: Eight Days a Week - The Touring Years (2016)
programme.desc: Director Ron Howard's documentary charting the period the Beatles spent on the road. Their first gigs with the classic line-up took place around Liverpool in 1961 and their last concert took place in San Francisco in 1966. During that brief span, they helped to forge a global pop culture. This film incorporates restored footage from the live shows, starting in Manchester in 1963, and includes several of the songs in their entirety. Contributors include Paul McCartney, Ringo Starr, Elvis Costello, Richard Curtis, Whoopi Goldberg, Eddie Izzard, Howard Goodall and Malcolm Gladwell(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Zach, who's 25, is rushed to A&E after completely severing four fingers in a building site accident. Staff and plastic surgeons assess the damage and stem the bloody wound. Cameras also follow former teacher Ricky, who's 85. She has hurt her back after falling at home, and 10-year-old Daquon was hit by a motorbike when he was on his way to school. He has memory loss and a badly broken arm(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 72-year-old is airlifted to St George's after being trampled by a herd of cows while walking her dog, and 13-year-old Tamzen has broken her leg at school trampoline practice. Meanwhile, 18-year-old art student Hermione has cut her hand on a glass at her part-time waitressing job(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts this festive edition of the comedy panel show's twist of the words and numbers quiz, with actress Kathy Burke and comedian Russell Howard joining team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson. Joe Lycett joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Joe Wilkinson 'assists' maths whizz Rachel Riley at the numbers board(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Zach, who's 25, is rushed to A&E after completely severing four fingers in a building site accident. Staff and plastic surgeons assess the damage and stem the bloody wound. Cameras also follow former teacher Ricky, who's 85. She has hurt her back after falling at home, and 10-year-old Daquon was hit by a motorbike when he was on his way to school. Ardal O'Hanlon and Dermot Morgan star(n)

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp goes searching for inspiration for Christmas tree decoration, with help from some of the most creative people around(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: The Caribbean island of Nevis is very close to Steven and Murila Fifer's hearts. Murila was born there, and the couple have visited the place together many times over the years. They have now decided their dream holiday home should be on the island, so Scarlette Douglas shows them five properties within their £330,000 budget. Will they fall for a country villa or a beach-side home?(n)

programme.title: Carry On Cleo (1964)
programme.desc: A captured Briton is mistaken for a heroic swordsman and promoted to the Roman Royal Guard, with orders to protect Julius Caesar. But the last thing he and the fated emperor expect is an assassination attempt from within Caesar's own circle of friends. Comedy, starring Amanda Barrie, Kenneth Williams, Sid James, Kenneth Connor, Jim Dale, Charles Hawtrey and Joan Sims(n)

programme.title: The 100 Greatest Musicals
programme.desc: Denise Van Outen concludes the rundown of viewers' favourite musicals, counting down from 50 to number one. Featuring interviews with stars including Scott Baio (Bugsy Malone), Lee Curreri (Fame), Ron Moody (Oliver!) and Susan Sarandon (The Rocky Horror Picture Show), as well as directors, writers and producers including Randal Kleiser (Grease), Rob Marshall (Chicago), Alan Parker (Evita, Fame and Bugsy Malone) and Cameron Mackintosh and Willy Russell (Blood Brothers). Plus, Omar Sharif, Elaine Paige, Michael Ball, Claire Sweeney, Jonathan Wilkes and Miss Piggy are among the contributors who reveal the impact these musicals have had on their lives(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Charity fundraiser Rachel Speight-McGregor kicks off a week of festive dinner parties in York. She hopes a full-on evening's entertainment, including carol singers on arrival, will impress her guests - baristar Harry Baines, pub landlady Estella Nicholson, administrative assistant Nicola Gregory and junior doctor Gyles Morrison - and see her on her way to securing the £1,000 prize(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Junior doctor Gyles Morrison serves a uniquely Caribbean take on a traditional Christmas dinner. Administrative assistant Nicola Gregory is captivated by his charm and keen to demonstrate her affection for the laid-back medic, but the other guests are less enamoured by their host as the dinner party challenge continues in York(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the third edition from York, vegetarian host Nicola Gregory hopes to convert four carnivores with her completely meat-free festive menu. However, the discovery by junior doctor Gyles Morrison and pub landlady Estella Nicholson of deer heads mounted in Nicola's garage leads the guests to question her vegan credentials. Meanwhile, charity fundraiser Rachel Speight-McGregor is more interested in drinking shots of salad dressing, and barista Harry Baines is concerned about his gift of a furry festive jock strap(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Harry Baines hosts the fourth festive edition of the competition from York and tries to prove to his fellow diners that his youth does not affect the quality of his cooking. To impress his guests he makes fiery cheesy focaccia, duck in blankets and mince pies(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Pub landlady Estella Nicholson hosts the last Christmas dinner from York in her own premises, rustling up a menu including festive fishcakes, cheesy elf bakes, drunken lamb, veggie moussaka and sticky toffee pudding. Admin assistant Nicola Gregory is keen to make amends for offending another guest, and after an eventful week, the winner is decided(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Festive edition of the documentary from 2015 following the work of Professor Noel Fitzpatrick and his team. A sleigh-pulling Alaskan malamute needs both knees replacing with implants, but his owners are forced to make a difficult decision as he recovers from his first operation. Meanwhile, a springer spaniel is rushed into the surgery with a shattered jaw, so the vets decide to try something new to get him home in time for Christmas. Plus, a miniature dachshund with a deformed foot is given intensive physiotherapy, and Noel gets a surprise visitor(n)

programme.title: The Dam Busters (1955)
programme.desc: The story of the destruction of the major dams in Germany's industrial heartland in the Ruhr valley in 1943, a mission that seemed impossible until engineer and scientist Barnes Wallis came up with the ingenious idea of bouncing bombs, and the pilots of 617 Squadron were trained to fly the crucial mission. Second World War drama, with Michael Redgrave, Richard Todd, Basil Sydney, Derek Farr and Ursula Jeans(n)

programme.title: Secret History
programme.desc: Dubbed 'The Beast' by Winston Churchill, Tirpitz was Nazi Germany's most powerful battleship. Protected by an elite squadron of fighters, it was seen as invincible, but after 34 failed attempts to sink it, the RAF sent in the 617 'Dambusters' Squadron and 9 Squadron. In a raid in November 1944 they managed to slip through enemy defences and destroy Tirpitz. With eyewitness accounts from surviving RAF crew, one of the Luftwaffe fighter pilots and German sailors, this documentary tells this extraordinary story and offers new evidence to explain the mission's improbable success(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: This festive episode from 1996 finds the Craggy Island clerics and six other priests lost in what seems to be the world's largest lingerie department, with only Ted's quick thinking preventing the Catholic Church being rocked by a major scandal. His bravery earns him the coveted Golden Cleric award, which is when his troubles really begin. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Frank Kelly(n)

programme.title: It Was Alright In
programme.desc: Matt Lucas narrates a look back at the decade's TV shows, meeting people who appeared in them, those who watched them and their creators. The first of two programmes focuses on pleasure and leisure on 1970s television, with featured clips including outrageous adult jokes in pre-watershed sitcoms, smoking cigarettes on prime-time panel shows, a surprising history lesson aimed at children, and St Bernard dogs being offered for prizes. The footage is also seen through the eyes of people who missed the decade altogether and who find the moral values exhibited to be a real eye-opener(n)

programme.desc: Sixty teams take on a very quick course down Windhaven Parkway in Fort Worth. Who will triumph in the Lone Star State?(n)

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve and a team of rock climbers head to the desert of southern Oman to attempt the first ascent of a towering escarpment, hoping to discover the rare and elusive Arabian leopard(n)

programme.title: Top Gear: Winter Blunderland
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May present their best winter challenges(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May visit Africa on a mission to find the definitive source of the Nile, the world's longest river, which spans more than 4,000 miles. The trio believe they can do a better job than explorers who claim to have discovered the waterway's starting point by travelling further and faster than previous efforts - but the only tools at their disposal are determination, ingenuity and three ageing estate cars(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May head to Norway to find out how a selection of cars fare when taking part in Winter Olympic events. Their experiments include firing a rocket-powered Mini off a ski jump, tackling the biathlon with 4x4s, staging a game of motorised ice hockey and timing the Jaguar XK in a speed-skating race(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Presenters Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May are challenged to build a bridge over the River Kwai in Thailand. In order to do that, however, they have to drive across Burma, a country that has been largely closed to Westerners for more than 40 years, and must make the trip in three lorries, each bought sight unseen from the internet on a limited budget. What follows is an epic journey of beautiful scenery, regular adversity, ongoing malfunction and the constant bickering of the three men(n)

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Broadcasters Sue Perkins and Liza Tarbuck drive along the Ho Chi Minh Trail, a network of roads and paths in Southeast Asia that was littered with unexploded bombs following the Vietnam War. Their journey takes them through jungles and mountains to some of the least-explored corners of Laos and Vietnam, and proves to be a gruelling test of their bravery, motoring skills and senses of humour(n)

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig has a Christmas knees-up in the pub with Alan Davies, Cariad Lloyd, Josh Widdicombe and Noel Fielding. Pub-themed questions are the order of the day, with a sprinkling of festive cheer along the way(n)

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Chef Hugh Fearnley-Whittingstall and comedians Rhod Gilbert, Rufus Hound and Miranda Hart are the guests on the comedy panel show. Team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack guide the contestants as they try to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Presented by Rob Brydon(n)

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Celebrities undertake some of the most perilous journeys in the world. Driving up Madagascar's eastern coast at the tail end of the rainy season is enough to test the best of friendships, but comedy actor Angus Deayton and broadcaster Mariella Frostrup are game enough to take on the challenge, and good enough friends to poke fun at each other along the way. The route has numerous river crossings and the duo face a variety of broken bridges and flimsy ferries as the only way across, while the roads themselves are mired with thick mud. Progress becomes increasingly painful and they are finally forced to spend a night in the car(n)

programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May embark on a road trip, trying to follow the path of the Three Wise Men across the Middle East. However, they opt to do so in open-top sports cars that were built for significantly less demanding tasks than driving along the conflict-ridden mountains of southern Turkey, through war-ravaged Iraq and across the searing deserts of Syria. The trio also try to find out what myrrh is and where it can be bought(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May travel to America for an interstate road trip, completing various challenges along the way. Starting in Miami, they each buy a car for less than $1,000 and drive to New Orleans, where they set out to give their vehicles away to people who suffered in Hurricane Katrina(n)

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: More thrills, spills, customer carts and crashes in this extreme downhill battle at the Eduardo VII Park in Lisbon(n)

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Twenty Twelve co-stars Hugh Bonneville and Jessica Hynes pair up again to go on a road trip through the former Soviet republic of Georgia. Driving from the border with Azerbaijan to the Black Sea, Jessica soon discovers her spirit of adventure is causing Hugh a few moments of high anxiety, but there is worse to come when they find themselves stuck on a high mountain pass in bad weather and he has to overcome his vertigo. While the drive is a challenge all the way, the country and its people delight and surprise them at every turn(n)

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Josh Widdicombe, Cariad Lloyd and Paul Sinha join regular panellist Alan Davies, as questionmaster Sandi Toksvig considers various phenomena. As ever, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window as the panellists attempt to answer the fiendishly difficult questions, with points invariably awarded for the answers the questionmaster finds most interesting, as opposed to correct(n)

programme.title: Room 101
programme.desc: Frank Skinner invites another three celebrities to reveal their pet hates in the hope he will banish them to Room 101. Actor, comedian and game-show host Alexander Armstrong reveals how he finds certain cocktail ingredients pointless, athlete Kelly Holmes is fed up of being given the runaround by the M25, and veteran sports commentator Henry Blofeld argues that people talking to him at breakfast simply isn't cricket(n)

programme.title: Room 101
programme.desc: Frank Skinner invites another three celebrities to reveal their pet hates in the hope he will banish them to Room 101. Veteran entertainer Des O'Connor reveals how he doesn't care for birthdays any more, broadcaster Adrian Chiles admits that women's shoes aren't for him and former Radio 1 Chart Show presenter Jameela Jamil isn't too keen on flatmates(n)

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Dara O Briain and regular panellist Hugh Dennis look back on another eventful week in news and politics, with the help of fellow comedians Angela Barnes, Ed Byrne, Milton Jones, Nish Kumar and Romesh Ranganathan. Stand-up and improvisation are the name of the game as the contestants try to get one up on each other(n)

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies sets tasks to Dave Gorman, Al Murray, Rob Beckett, Sara Pascoe and Paul Chowdhry, including a challenge involving a cement-filled shoebox(n)

programme.title: WW2 Price of Empire
programme.desc: The German army's Blitzkrieg tactics, which led to the swift conquest of Holland, Belgium and France(n)

programme.title: WW2 Price of Empire
programme.desc: A focus on the Battle of Britain and the Blitz and the Italian troops entering North Africa(n)

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: How German U-boats were used to disrupt the flow of goods from America across the Atlantic Ocean in an attempt to starve Britain into submission(n)

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Account of Operation Barbarossa, Germany's plan to invade the Soviet Union in 1941, revealing the massive human and financial cost endured by the Soviet people, who fought a bloody and lonely war with little support from the Allies. Narrated by Laurence Olivier(n)

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: British bombers are unable to hit their targets precisely and attack German cities under cover of darkness, while the Blitz in Britain brings public demand for revenge strikes, and Arthur Harris takes charge of Bomber Command(n)

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Rare footage of the elusive animals that live in the unforgiving environment of the world's mountain ranges. A female snow leopard with a cub ends up caught between two rival males, grizzly bears rub themselves up against trees in an attempt to shed their winter fur, and golden eagles hunt over snow-capped peaks(n)

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Footage of plants and animals that live in jungles, one of the hardest environments to thrive in, including strange fungi and creatures that glow in the dark which have never been captured on film before. The programme also includes recordings of caimans and the jaguars that prey on them, freshwater dolphins that swim through flooded forests, undergrowth-dwelling frogs that have to defend themselves against wasps, and the Indri, the world's largest living lemur, which inhabits the forests of Madagascar(n)

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Footage of animals that live in the desert, including a pride of desert lions that risks hunting a giraffe several times their size. The film also features an immense swarm of locusts, sand grouse flying for 120 miles to gather water for their offspring, and an unprecedented recording of a tiny bat defending itself against one of the world's deadliest scorpions(n)

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Wildlife that inhabit the world's grasslands, areas that are struck by some of the most dramatic seasonal changes seen in the world. The programme features footage of Brazil's giant anteaters and Asian saiga antelope, as well as lions engaging in ferocious battles with buffalo in the flooded Okavango, bee-eaters taking advantage of elephants to help them catch insects, and caribou embarking on migrations across the freezing northern tundra, stalked every step of the way by predatory Arctic wolves(n)

programme.title: Underground Worlds

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Churchill's plan to attack Germany through Italy. Although considered the simplest military solution, the Allies were to face formidable opposition, while the Americans met the Wehrmacht for the first time. Narrated by Laurence Olivier(n)

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The longest retreat in British military history, when Allied troops defending Burma in 1942 were confronted by Japanese forces well prepared for jungle warfare. Narrated by Laurence Olivier(n)

programme.title: The World at War

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Performances by punk and new wave acts on the music show in 1977, including the Stranglers and the Jam, plus the continuing power of disco exemplified by Donna Summer's I Feel Love, the reggae of Bob Marley and pub rock by acts such as Eddie and the Hot Rods. Insight into performing on the programme comes from musicians including John Otway, JJ Burnel of the Stranglers, Paul Cook of the Sex Pistols, members of Darts and the Adverts, as well as contributions from Nicky Wire, Alexis Petridis and Pete Paphides(n)

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Documentary about the change of musical direction in 1978, when pop singles were slowly ousted by disco, punk and new wave artists. The programme features contributions by members of the Boomtown Rats, Squeeze, Boney M and Sham 69 - among others - and archive performances by the likes of Elvis Costello, the Undertones, Ian Dury and the Blockheads and the Jam(n)

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: The role played by engineering giant Vickers during the Second World War, including the development of the Spitfire and how the Royal Navy recovered from losing so many warships(n)

programme.title: World's Greatest Palaces
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of Neuschwanstein Castle in the Alps of southern Germany. Created for eccentric king Ludwig the second in the 19th century, the castle is both a visual and engineering marvel that was an influence on Walt Disney. Containing a huge throne room and man-made cave, it took 17 years to build but was never fully completed after Ludwig was deposed, incarcerated and mysteriously died in 1868(n)

programme.title: World's Greatest Palaces
programme.desc: A look at Edinburgh Castle - a symbol of Scottish might that has been besieged more than 20 times and has existed in many guises, including a military fortress, prison and palace(n)

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates the story of the D-Day landings in June 1944, when the Allies launched the biggest ever amphibious invasion on the beaches of Normandy. Although both sides suffered heavy casualties, it proved to be the turning point in the war against Germany(n)

programme.title: The World at War

programme.title: Fleetwood Mac - Don't Stop
programme.desc: Documentary looking back over the band's long career, from the early blues outfit led by Peter Green in the late 1960s, to their reincarnation in the 1970s with the line-up that went on to record the 40-million-selling album Rumours. Mick Fleetwood, John McVie, Lindsey Buckingham and Stevie Nicks reveal the truth behind the successes, failures and relationships that characterised their music and made them one of the most enduring acts in popular music(n)

programme.title: Meat Loaf: In and Out of Hell
programme.desc: A profile of the rock star's life and career, reflecting on the music that propelled him to fame and charting his journey from an overweight, bullied child to his larger-than-life persona and icon status. Featuring an interview and performance by the singer, as well as backstage footage from a Las Vegas concert. The film also revisits the Dallas of Meat Loaf's early years and includes insights from high school friends who reveal where the unusual moniker really came from(n)

programme.title: The Rolling Stones at the BBC
programme.desc: A selection of the band's performances from the BBC archives, in a programme originally broadcast in 2012 to celebrate their 50th anniversary. Songs include The Last Time, Let's Spend The Night Together, Get Off of My Cloud, Honky Tonk Women, Gimme Shelter, Miss You and Start Me Up. Plus, footage of the band performing 19th Nervous Breakdown on Top of the Pops in 1966, which was used in a 1960s BBC documentary about women with depression(n)

programme.title: Tom Jones at the BBC

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The dinner party challenge arrives in Northampton, where first host Russell hopes to win his guests over by serving up camel meatballs. programme.desc: Billy, Gwendoline and Michael finally hope to move into their chateau so they can host a hen party, although the kitchen's unfinished. programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Billy and Gwendoline need help tracking down the wild boars causing chaos around their chateau. Paul continues the task of converting his water tower into an office(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Jasmine Harmin and Laura Hamilton go head to head to help Sue and David Sherlock from Stockport. The couple want a fresh start with their daughter, but cannot decide where to start their new adventure. David is championing the Lake District, close to his three grown-up daughters, but Sue wants a complete change and thinks their future lies in the Dordogne region of France. Jasmine is given a UK budget of £730,000, but it's going to be close as Laura tries to entice them across the Channel with three attractive properties in France worth up to £500,000(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Sun-worshippers Carol and Junior Smith from Middles have cashed in their savings and cannot wait to buy a holiday home where they can spend more quality time as a family. With a budget of £70,000, Jonnie Irwin shows them five properties near the popular Mar Menor in the south-east of Spain. Will they go for a bungalow with a rooftop terrace or a spacious townhouse that has them lost for words?(n)

Plus, there's a tour of FAO Schwarz, New York's biggest and most famous toy store, which is behind a proud new addition to Selfridges in London's Oxford Street, its first UK outlet(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rav Wilding is first to host a round of festive celebrity meals, entertaining Rebecca Adlington, Jennifer Ellison, Alex Carter and Mrs Moneypenny(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Stage and screen actress Jennifer Ellison hosts the third dinner party, and hopes an evening of 'restaurant quality' and a singing waiter will be enough to impress her guests(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former Hollyoaks and Emmerdale actor Alex Carter plans an Indian-themed curry menu for the fourth festive dinner party, but his choice of dishes meets a mixed reception(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: SuperScrimpers' own Mrs Moneypenny hosts the fifth and final party of the contest, choosing a traditional Christmas set-up, complete with venison on the menu(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First to host in Swindon is comic book-loving, fitness fanatic Claire, who hopes her traditional British menu and pole dancing entertainment will impress her guests. Entrepreneur Jason serves one of the world's most expensive meats on night two, while straight-talking Chris is less impressed with posh food, and last to host is Ava, a pescetarian whom Chris struggles to relate to(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: Thrown out of a restaurant and forced to take shelter in a museum on Christmas Eve, Will, Grace, Karen and Jack end up whisked back in time to New York of 1912. There they find that Karen is a poor Irish immigrant feeding nine children on stolen onions, Jack her burly muscular sailor lodger, Will their penny-pinching landlord and Grace his oblivious wife. Karen worries she will have to sell her body to Will to pay the rent, but Jack realises that Will is unlikely to take that offer. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk and Robert Culp(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team investigates the case of a 10-month-old girl who was taken from her parents in a shopping mall. The biological father is brought in for questioning and reveals he played a part in his daughter's kidnapping, but his accomplice seems to have a hidden agenda. programme.desc: A murderer wages a cyber war on healthcare workers he holds a grudge against. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Anna Belknap, with Greg Germann (Ally McBeal)(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami

David Caruso, Emily Procter and Adam Rodriguez star(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica learns her old teacher has been killed shortly after revising her will, putting the new beneficiary - a TV evangelist - under suspicion of committing murder. Starring Angela Lansbury and Richard Herd(n)

programme.title: Columbo: The Most Crucial Game (1972)
programme.desc: The owner of an American football team is found dead in a swimming pool, and his drowning is regarded as an accident. The down-at-heel detective is convinced that foul play was involved and sets out to prove his case - but his chief suspect has a cast-iron alibi that places him miles away from the scene of the crime. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk and Robert Culp(n)

programme.title: Columbo: A Deadly State of Mind (1975)
programme.desc: A philandering psychiatrist, who involved his mistress in a series of hypnosis experiments, kills her husband in the heat of the moment when the pair are caught out. He persuades his distraught lover to make up a story involving two burglars, but Lt Columbo realises she is lying and goes in search of the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, George Hamilton and Lesley Warren(n)

programme.title: Columbo: By Dawn's Early Light (1974)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The DIY SOS team are out of their comfort zone this week, joining forces with two world-famous institutions - Great Ormond Street Hospital and the Chelsea Flower Show - for a special challenge. Gardener Chris Beardshaw has promised his gold medal-winning garden from the flower show to the hospital - now all Nick Knowles and his fellow builders have to do is crane the display across London and rebuild it on the hospital. It's a hugely ambitious build, with tricky logistics and emotional volunteers. But knowing how much the garden will prove welcome respite for families, the team is determined not to fail(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team descends on Swansea to tackle one of their biggest challenges to date, as they build a centre and supported housing for young people in care and leaving care. This special programme also shares the stories from some of Wales' most vulnerable young people as well as the founder of the Roots Foundation Wales, a charity that supports young people in and leaving care. The team, with the help of hundreds of volunteers, build a bespoke new centre and transitional flats from the ground up for Roots, a charity, part-funded by BBC Children in Need despite storms and a tight 11-day build schedule(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles, his team and a group of volunteers are in Monmouth, Wales, to transform the family home of Charlotte, a mother recovering from a stroke that left her with brain damage, speech loss and partial paralysis. The current layout of her home makes it difficult for Charlotte to move around and have her physiotherapy treatment, so the team redesign the house to make things easier for her, her husband Rob and their children(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to the Isle of Sheppey in Kent to meet two extraordinary dads, Garry and Kyle, who have adopted four vulnerable children - three of whom have special needs - to give them the best life possible. But their cramped three-bedroom bungalow is making family life difficult. So to give this family the space they so desperately need, the DIY SOS builders are undertaking their most ambitious project yet - to demolish the bungalow and build a bespoke five-bedroom house in its place. But with just nine days to complete the task, it looks like being their toughest one yet(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles meets midwife and kidney patient Sascha, who has to undergo intense dialysis sessions for hours on end, five days a week. This places the mother-of-four's body under great stress and the constant threat of blood clots gives her a life expectancy of just a few years. Determined to help, the DIY SOS team, bolstered by the local tradespeople and volunteers of Welwyn Garden City, renovate her home to include a dedicated dialysis room, offering her the chance of many more years with her family(n)

programme.title: Air Ambulance ER
programme.desc: Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the work of Britain's emergency helicopter medical services, capturing the action as teams respond to various crisis calls up and down the country. A doctor's trauma skills are put to the test by a dramatic accident in South Shields, a cyclist with a life-threatening head injury requires attention in Oxford and a speedway racer is in a bad way after coming off the track at 80mph(n)

programme.title: Air Ambulance ER
programme.desc: Documentary following Britain's emergency helicopter medical services. A team races to the aid of a mother and daughter involved in a high-speed motorcycle crash, before zipping off to the Lake District to help a cyclist hit by a car. Timing is everything, too, when the crew turn their attention to a four-year-old girl with a serious leg fracture(n)

programme.title: Air Ambulance ER
programme.desc: Documentary following Britain's emergency helicopter medical services. The pressure is on as teams race to the scene of a traffic accident in rural Oxfordshire where a family car has left the country road and plummeted 30ft into a ravine. Concern also grows for a jockey who has fallen off her horse and suffered an open leg fracture that requires a dose of painkillers three times the amount that would normally be administered to an injured British solider. Finally, the search is on for a lost paraglider - yielding surprising results(n)

programme.title: The Most Wonderful Time of the Year (2008)

programme.title: Customs UK

programme.title: Customs UK
programme.desc: A passenger at Bristol Airport is caught smuggling cigarettes and admits to doing it for more than 10 years, and a suspicious bag is seized at Gatwick with £55,000 of cannabis inside. Plus, the crew of the fast cutter searcher investigates mysterious pot-markers off the Cornish coast(n)

programme.title: Customs UK
programme.desc: Customs officers at Bristol catch three passengers carrying 87kg of tobacco. Claiming the amount is for personal use they put up a fight when they learn they may not be allowed to keep it. The crew of the Searcher boards a yacht on the trail of drugs, and a sniffer dog picks up a scent at Gatwick that turns out to be cocaine. John Rand narrates(n)

programme.title: Customs UK
programme.desc: Off Cornwall, the crew of the fast cutter Searcher decides to board a lone yacht coming from the Canaries, a frequent transit point for cocaine. Officers in Dover detect a mysterious shadow in a truck full of chipboard, and in Bristol a man is caught carrying 5,000 cigarettes back from Turkey(n)

programme.title: Customs UK
programme.desc: In Dover, the specialist rummage team discovers a ton of cannabis hidden in a truck, and in Cornwall a ship's captain lies to officers of the cutter Searcher about the number of cigarettes he has on board. At Gatwick, a suspected heroin smuggler is subjected to an intimate search. Narrated by Jon Rand(n)

programme.title: Customs UK
programme.desc: The crew of the cutter Searcher boards a suspicious yacht off the coast of Cornwall and receives an angry welcome. Narrated by Jon Rand(n)

programme.title: Customs UK
